input.command:
COH=~/Library/Application\ Support/LaunchCat/coh
LOG="$COH/logs/launcher/launcher.log"

echo "=== preflight ==="
echo "stale lock present? $([ -f "$COH/settings/launcher/launcher.running" ] && echo 'YES (unexpected)' || echo 'no ✅')"
echo "wine procs running? $(ps aux | grep -iE 'wine|cityofheroes|launchcat' | grep -v grep | wc -l | tr -d ' ')"
# mark log offset so we only read new lines
wc -c < "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' ' > /tmp/coh_log_offset.txt
echo "log offset marked: $(cat /tmp/coh_log_offset.txt)"

echo
echo "=== LAUNCH /Applications/LaunchCat.app ==="
open -a "/Applications/LaunchCat.app" && echo "  open command issued"

# poll for launcher window
for i in $(seq 1 12); do
  sleep 2
  RES=$(osascript <<'AS' 2>/dev/null
tell application "System Events"
  repeat with p in (every process whose name is "wine64-preloader")
    try
      repeat with w in (windows of p)
        if (name of w as string) contains "Homecoming" then return "WINDOW-UP"
      end repeat
    end try
  end repeat
  return "waiting"
end tell
AS
)
  LEXE=$(ps aux | grep -iE 'launcher\.exe' | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
  echo "t=$((i*2))s  window=$RES  launcher.exe=${LEXE:-none}"
  [ "$RES" = "WINDOW-UP" ] && break
done
input.description: Launch LaunchCat and wait for launcher window
